race.comment: SUIT OF WANDS (9) has been much better in his last two and came close to striking through last time. Only missed by a long neck to PETIT EAGLE, who he meets with an important weight swing this time. Drawn sticky but should have enough early muster to offset and looms a big hope. PETIT EAGLE (3) finished over the top of them over this trip last time. Goes up in the weights but keeps Holder and will be hoping to rinse and repeat. CHANCE TAKEN (7) has been warming nicely without causing any real threat so far but should be at his top now. Backs up quickly and the rise in trip suits. FIABESCA (12) doesn't win out of turn but is going better than her form reads and only needs to hold her form to make her presence felt. UNITED LEGEND (6) is also ticking along nicely and boasts a strong record here. Draws well and can't be taken lightly.
